heading: Requirement regarding medicaid
label: 300l–1 Requirement regarding medicaid
text: The Secretary may not make a grant under for a program in a State unless the State plan under title XIX of the Social Security Act [ et seq.] for the State includes the screening procedures specified in subparagraphs (A) and (B) of as medical assistance provided under the plan.section 300k of this title42 U.S.C. 1396section 300m(a)(2) of this title
notes: References in TextThe Social Security Act, referred to in text, is , . Title XIX of the Act is classified generally to subchapter XIX (§ 1396 et seq.) of chapter 7 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 53149 Stat. 620section 1305 of this title
